name: aarontjones-portfolio
description:
This is my portfolio website, written in TypeScript and CSS.

I used TypeScript as I needed to practice my skills with it, as I don't have much experience with it than I do with web frameworks such as Django or Flask.

name: machine-translation
description:
This project is meant to explore development of creating API's and calling them, as well as machine translation, which I explored in my dissertation project for university.

It is another TypeScript project, with a python script backend, using a Hugging Face Transformer to translate into spanish.

You can visit it here: aarontjones.github.io/machine-translation.

name: tandztats
description:
This is a website for my friend, who is starting his own tattoo business.

You can visit the website, and explore at www.tandztat.uk

As of now, It is unfinished, as I am awaiting usage of his Meta API key, to get images onto his website
